symbolic_system.boundary: Documents the positive and negative compiler-record validation fixtures for FSST Milestone 1E.

carrier.carrier_state: v0.1 refusal-fixture result with schema-invalid cases, guardrail cases, validation results, and claim ceiling
carrier.carrier_state_space: fixture lists, validation results, schema-vs-guardrail distinctions, findings, claim ceilings, next-pressure statements
carrier.maintainer: FSST formation docs and compiler-record validation workflow

use_episode.use: Use the refusal-fixture doctrine to decide whether later compiler-record tooling preserves hard schema refusal and guardrail refusal behavior.
use_episode.actor_context: FSST compiler tooling maintenance and milestone regression checks
use_episode.inference_drawn: The fixture set can serve as a local regression pressure surface for schema and validator changes.
non_inferences: The refusal fixtures prove the source artifacts are true.
The fixture set is complete for all possible compiler-record failures.
Passing the fixture set licenses production compiler status.

binding.binding_target: the validator refusal behavior and fixture interpretation recorded by Milestone 1E
binding.operative_mode: regression guidance for compiler-record schema and validator changes

validity.validity_criterion: The record preserves the documented 1E claim ceiling, fixture classes, validation results, and non-claims without upgrading them.
validity.validity_evidence: Milestone 1E writeup records schema-invalid failures=7 warnings=0, guardrail failures=0 warnings=5, strict warning failure, and positive 1D pass.
validity.confidence: high for local tooling-regression use; not applicable to domain truth
validity.uncertainty: The fixture set is hand-built and may not cover future schema or semantic failure families.

scope.scope_conditions: FSST compiler-record schema, validator, scaffold, and fixture maintenance for Milestones 1E and 1G.
scope_lost: coverage of all future compiler-record failure modes

recognition_authority.recognizer_standing: The validator has standing over schema and guardrail outcomes; maintainers have standing to interpret milestone claim ceilings; future harnesses may only preserve those checks.
recognition_authority.authority_source: FSST formation docs, v0.2 schema, validator script, and recorded 1E validation results.
recognition_authority.uptake_path: 1E formation writeup -> scaffold-filled record -> validator -> future regression harness

distributed_standing.standing_scope: detect schema failures and guardrail warnings for compiler-record JSON
distributed_standing.standing_basis: JSON Schema v0.2 plus validator guardrail code

distributed_standing.standing_scope: interpret fixture results and update formation doctrine
rerun positive and negative checks without expanding their claim ceiling

response_eligibility: warn or fail on guardrail overreach

policy_license.licensed_consequence: Treat this filled record as a clean local example of scaffold -> fill -> validate.
policy_license.license_basis: No TODO markers, explicit scope, blocked consequences, distributed standing, and bounded claim ceiling.

transmission.transmission_path: 1F scaffold shape -> hand-filled compiler record -> validator -> 1G regression harness

unlicensed_links: production compiler promotion is not licensed

reflexive_pressure.notes: This record demonstrates scaffold -> fill -> validate without upgrading the scaffold to semantic extraction.
